description: Canonical vocabulary for the splunkVersions[] field on every UC sidecar. Maintained by docs/splunk-version-matrix.md; gated by `python3 -m splunk_uc audit-splunk-version-matrix --check`. See ADR-0011 (planned) for the version-evolution policy.

tokens.description: Splunk Enterprise 8.0 – 8.2. End-of-support; UCs declaring 8.x should be re-validated against 9.x before the next minor release.
Splunk Enterprise 9.0 or later (use the more specific 9.N+ tokens when the SPL relies on a feature introduced in that minor).
Splunk Enterprise 9.0 and later. Reserve for SPL that requires a 9.0 feature (e.g. new eval functions).
Splunk Enterprise 9.1 and later. Reserve for SPL that requires a 9.1 feature.
Splunk Enterprise 9.2 and later. Most common modern-on-prem floor.
Splunk Enterprise 9.3 and later. Reserve for SPL that requires a 9.3 feature.
Splunk Enterprise 10.0 or later. New-platform floor.
Splunk Cloud (current GA experience — covers both Victoria and Classic until those become breaking-change axes).
